summary: Tested Shelfsort signup-config / community-rules / onboarding feature set. 13/13 backend endpoint tests pass against the running API. Public /rules page and register multi-step onboarding flow verified end-to-end via Playwright. Admin card UI was not directly visually confirmed because page.goto('/admin') redirects to '/' on this preview URL even after a successful fetch login (auth-context hydration race — same issue main agent reported); the card+toggles+stats+rules-editor data-testids are all confirmed present in AdminConsole.jsx source and the underlying APIs they call are all green.

minor.issue: Backend WatchFiles reloader is highly sensitive — any edit under /app/backend/tests/ triggers a multi-second reload during which all HTTPS calls hang/timeout. Long-term harmless; only affects iterative test authoring.
Pre-existing KeyError: 'suggestion_id' in routes/suggestions.py _serialize visible in stderr log — unrelated to this iteration but worth a follow-up.

integration_issues.flow: Admin /admin navigation via in-test fetch login
integration_issues.issue: page.goto('/admin') after credentials:'include' fetch login still redirects to '/' — AuthContext hasn't hydrated by the time AdminRoute evaluates. Workaround: navigate to '/' first, await /auth/me, then goto /admin. Functional flow is fine for real users (they're already authed in the browser).

action_items: Visually self-test the AdminConsole 'Sign-up rules & questions' card in the live browser (login as shelfsort-tester, hit /admin, expand card, toggle approval-gate + questions, check Saved toast, open rules editor, save).
Optional: fix pre-existing /api/suggestions KeyError: 'suggestion_id' (unrelated to this iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: signup_config.py — clean, defaults preserved, admin gate via require_admin, length validation (20 / 50000) returns 400 / 413 as specified.

auth.py register flow — gate-off path correctly auto-approves and issues session (no {pending:true}); questions_enabled path enforces accepted_rules (400), at-least-one-onboarding-answer (400), is_13_plus=false (403). Onboarding payload is sanitized (trim, lowercased keys, length-capped).
First-user bootstrap correctly bypasses the questions/rules gate (is_first_user short-circuit) — good for fresh installs.
Rules.jsx renders markdown via tiny home-grown formatter — H1/H2/paragraphs styled correctly; data-testid='rules-loading' + 'rules-content' + 'rules-empty' all wired.
Login.jsx multi-step register: signupCfg re-fetched whenever mode flips, step gating handled, submit button correctly disabled until rules checkbox is ticked.

AdminConsole.jsx — all six required data-testids ('admin-signup-rules-card', 'signup-toggle-approval-gate', 'signup-toggle-questions', 'signup-onboarding-stats', 'signup-rules-edit', 'signup-rules-save') are present in source.

success_rate.frontend: Rules page + register onboarding flow verified (2/3 UI flows). Admin card not visually confirmed (data-testids verified statically + backend APIs green).

test_credentials: Admin: shelfsort-tester@example.com / tester123! (is_admin=true). Test config reset to {approval_gate_enabled:true, questions_enabled:false} after tests.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_*@example.com pending registrations (gate-on path leaves them in 'pending' state harmlessly; reddit referral count incremented by 1 per stats verification test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_signup_config.py — they use TEST_BASE_URL or REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and fall back to http://localhost:8001. They extract session_token from Set-Cookie and use Bearer auth (the Secure cookie is otherwise dropped over plain HTTP). If the live preview URL times out, restart backend (sudo supervisorctl restart backend), wait ~12 sec, then run with TEST_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8001. WatchFiles reload of /app/backend/tests/* will briefly hang all calls — avoid editing test files while a run is in flight.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration's feature surface.
